mapper.select: select id, resources_ip, resources_port, resources_password, resources_status, resource_tenant, lease_expiration_time, sales_status, available_status, cloud_service_provider, cloud_user, node_url, node_port, public_broker_key, sni, short_id, user_id, commodity_id, is_deleted, create_user, update_user, create_time, update_time from server_resources where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0

select distinct commodity_id from server_resources where is_deleted = 0 and commodity_id in
#{item}
mapper.insert: insert into server_resources(id,resources_ip, resources_port, resources_password, resources_status, resource_tenant, lease_expiration_time, sales_status, available_status, cloud_service_provider, cloud_user, node_url, node_port, public_broker_key, sni, short_id, user_id, commodity_id, is_deleted, create_user, update_user, create_time, update_time) values (#{entity.id},#{resourcesIp}, #{resourcesPort}, #{resourcesPassword}, #{resourcesStatus}, #{resourceTenant}, #{leaseExpirationTime}, #{salesStatus}, #{availableStatus}, #{cloudServiceProvider}, #{cloudUser}, #{nodeUrl}, #{nodePort}, #{publicBrokerKey}, #{sni}, #{shortId}, #{userId}, #{commodityId}, #{isDeleted}, #{createUser}, #{updateUser}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})

insert into server_resources(id,resources_ip, resources_port, resources_password, resources_status, resource_tenant, lease_expiration_time, sales_status, available_status, cloud_service_provider, cloud_user, node_url, node_port, public_broker_key, sni, short_id, user_id, commodity_id, is_deleted, create_user, update_user, create_time, update_time) values
(#{entity.id},#{entity.resourcesIp}, #{entity.resourcesPort}, #{entity.resourcesPassword}, #{entity.resourcesStatus}, #{entity.resourceTenant}, #{entity.leaseExpirationTime}, #{entity.salesStatus}, #{entity.availableStatus}, #{entity.cloudServiceProvider}, #{entity.cloudUser}, #{entity.nodeUrl}, #{entity.nodePort}, #{entity.publicBrokerKey}, #{entity.sni}, #{entity.shortId}, #{entity.userId}, #{entity.commodityId}, #{entity.isDeleted}, #{entity.createUser}, #{entity.updateUser}, #{entity.createTime}, #{entity.updateTime})

insert into server_resources(id,resources_ip, resources_port, resources_password, resources_status, resource_tenant, lease_expiration_time, sales_status, available_status, cloud_service_provider, cloud_user, node_url, node_port, public_broker_key, sni, short_id, user_id, commodity_id, is_deleted, create_user, update_user, create_time, update_time) values
(#{entity.id},#{entity.resourcesIp}, #{entity.resourcesPort}, #{entity.resourcesPassword}, #{entity.resourcesStatus}, #{entity.resourceTenant}, #{entity.leaseExpirationTime}, #{entity.salesStatus}, #{entity.availableStatus}, #{entity.cloudServiceProvider}, #{entity.cloudUser}, #{entity.nodeUrl}, #{entity.nodePort}, #{entity.publicBrokerKey}, #{entity.sni}, #{entity.shortId}, #{entity.userId}, #{entity.commodityId}, #{entity.isDeleted}, #{entity.createUser}, #{entity.updateUser}, #{entity.createTime}, #{entity.updateTime})
on duplicate key update resources_ip = values(resources_ip), resources_port = values(resources_port), resources_password = values(resources_password), resources_status = values(resources_status), resource_tenant = values(resource_tenant), lease_expiration_time = values(lease_expiration_time), sales_status = values(sales_status), available_status = values(available_status), cloud_service_provider = values(cloud_service_provider), cloud_user = values(cloud_user), node_url = values(node_url), node_port = values(node_port), public_broker_key = values(public_broker_key), sni = values(sni), short_id = values(short_id), user_id = values(user_id), commodity_id = values(commodity_id), is_deleted = values(is_deleted), create_user = values(create_user), update_user = values(update_user), create_time = values(create_time), update_time = values(update_time)
